channel.title: GNfood
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNfood, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Orleans BBQ Shrimp
item.description: Tender shrimp in a rich, buttery garlic sauce.

item.title: Million Dollar Pasta Salad
item.description: Pasta salad with crispy bacon and sharp cheese.

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #86
item.description: A lineup of easy dinners to simplify your week.

item.title: Baked Sweet Hawaiian Chicken
item.description: Chicken dish with double the sauce for a Hawaiian-inspired meal.
